  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Astrologian
    Represents the Astrologian job and its specific choices
    AuRa
    Represents the Au Ra race and its specific stat bonuses
    AuRa.AuRaClan
    Represents the two distinct Auri clans
    Bard
    Represents the Bard job and the specific choices
    BlackMage
    Represents the Black Mage job and its specific choices
    Character
    This class lays the groundwork for all characters It controls the core of the character, including alignment, sex, race, and name
    Character.Alignment
    Represents the alignment system and choices a character has
    Character.Sex
    Represents the available biological sexes for character generation.
    CharacterCreator
    The main class, where the user is prompted and the character is created
    Dancer
    Represents the Dancer job and its specific choices
    DarkKnight
    Represents the Dark Knight job and its specific choices
    DiceRoller
    This class is used to randomly roll the dice for the stats
    DiceRollerTest
     
    Dragoon
    Represents the Dragoon class and its specific choices
    Elezen
    Represents the Elezen race and its specific stat bonuses
    Elezen.ElezenClan
    Represents the three distinct clans of the Elezen race
    FileLoaderTest
     
    Garlean
    Represents the Garlean race and its specific stat bonuses
    Garlean.GarleanTitles
    Represents each of the titles of the Garlean Empire with descriptions
    Gunbreaker
    Represents the Gunbreaker job and its specific choices
    Hrothgar
    Represents the Hrothgar and its specific stat bonuses
    Hrothgar.HrothgarClan
    Represents the two distinct clans of the Hrothgar
    Hyur
    Represents the Hyur race and its specific stat bonuses
    Hyur.HyurClan
    Represents the three distinct clans of the Hyur
    Job
    This class lays the groundwork for all jobs (Pictomancer, Sage, Bard, etc.) It controls the core of the jobs, including HP, spells and cantrips, and standard job logic.
    Lalafell
    Represents the Lalafell race and its specific stat bonuses
    Lalafell.LalafellClan
    Represents the two distinct clans of the Lalafell
    Machinist
    Represents the Machinist class and its specific choices
    Miqote
    Represents the Miqo'te race and its specific stat bonuses
    Miqote.MiqoteClan
    Represents the two distinct clans of the Miqo'te race
    Monk
    Represents the Monk job and its specific choices
    Ninja
    Represents the Ninja job and its specific choices
    Paladin
    Represents the Paladin job and its specific choices
    Pictomancer
    Represents the Pictomancer job and its specific choices
    PlayerChoices
    This class is used to ask the player questions and assign the answers
    Race
    Lays the groundwork for every race, including name, stats, and a description of each race
    Race.Stat
    Represents each stat the character has
    Reaper
    Represents the Reaper job and its specific choices
    RedMage
    Represents the Red Mage job and its specific choices
    Roegadyn
    Represents the Roegadyn race and its specific stat bonuses
    Roegadyn.RoegadynClan
    Represents the two distinct clans of the Roegadyn race
    Sage
    Represents the Sage job and its specific choices
    Samurai
    Represents the Samurai job and its specific choices
    Scholar
    Represents the Scholar job and its specific choices
    StatAssignmentTest
     
    Summoner
    Represents the Summoner job and its specific choices
    Viera
    Represents the Viera race and its specific stat bonuses
    Viera.VieraClan
     
    Viper
    Represents the Viper job and its specific choices
    Warrior
    Represents the Warrior job and its specific choices
    WhiteMage
    Represents the White Mage job and its specific choices
